sentences.target: Ich kann deine E-Mail später beantworten.

translations.de: Ich kann deine E-Mail später beantworten.
translations.en: I can answer your email later.
translations.es: Voy a contestar tu correo más tarde.
translations.fr: Je répondrai à ton mail plus tard.
translations.it: Ti risponderò alla tua email più tardi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我稍后再回复你的邮件。
translations.ru: Я отвечу на твоё письмо позже.
translations.pt: Vou responder ao seu e-mail mais tarde.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ trả lời email của bạn sau.
translations.nl: Ik reageer later op je e-mail.
translations.uk: Я відповім на твій лист пізніше.
translations.hi: मैं बाद में आपके ईमेल का जवाब दूँगा.
translations.el: Θα απαντήσω στο email σου αργότερα.
translations.nb: Jeg svarer på e-posten din senere.
translations.id: Saya akan membalas email kamu nanti.
translations.sv: Jag svarar på ditt mejl senare.
translations.ro: Îți răspund la email mai târziu.
translations.da: Jeg svarer på din e-mail senere.
translations.ja: あとであなたのメールに返信します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; serves as the subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects the bare infinitive 'beantworten'.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular) agreeing with a feminine singular noun; accusative form as part of the direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'beantworten' in the accusative.
Temporal adverb (comparative of 'spät'); modifies the time of the action.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; non-separable prefix verb; complement of the modal 'kann' and takes an accusative direct object ('deine E-Mail').

sentences.target: Meine Chefin will die Anfrage gleich beantworten.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃeːfɪn vɪl diː ˈʔanfʁaːɡə ɡlaɪ̯ç bəˈʔantvɔʁtən/

translations.de: Meine Chefin will die Anfrage gleich beantworten.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃeːfɪn vɪl diː ˈʔanfʁaːɡə ɡlaɪ̯ç bəˈʔantvɔʁtən/
translations.en: My boss wants to answer the inquiry right away.
translations.es: Mi jefa quiere responder la consulta enseguida.
translations.fr: Ma cheffe veut répondre à la demande tout de suite.
translations.it: La mia capa vuole rispondere alla richiesta subito.
translations.ko: 상사가 문의에 바로 답하고 싶어 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我老板想马上回复这次询问。
translations.yue: 我女上司想即刻回覆個查詢。
translations.ru: Моя начальница хочет ответить на запрос сразу.
translations.pt: Minha chefe quer responder à solicitação agora mesmo.
translations.he: הבוסית שלי רוצה לענות לפנייה מיד.
translations.vi: Sếp tôi muốn trả lời yêu cầu ngay.
translations.ar: רئيستي تريد الرد على الاستفسار فورًا.
translations.nl: Mijn baas wil de aanvraag meteen beantwoorden.
translations.uk: Моя начальниця хоче одразу відповісти на запит.
translations.hu: A főnököm azonnal szeretne válaszolni a megkeresésre.
translations.hi: मेरी बॉस तुरंत उस पूछताछ का जवाब देना चाहती हैं.
translations.pl: Moja szefowa chce od razu odpowiedzieć ha зaпytanie.
translations.el: Η προϊσταμένη μου θέλει να απαντήσει στο αίτημα αμέσως.
translations.nb: Sjefen min vil svare på henvendelsen med én gang.
translations.id: Bos saya ingin menjawab permintaan itu sekarang juga.
translations.sv: Min chef vill svara på förfrågan direkt.
translations.ro: Șefa mea vrea să răspundă la solicitare imediat.
translations.cs: Moje šéfová chce hned odpovědět na dotaz.
translations.da: Min chef vil svare på forespørgslen med det samme.
translations.ja: 上司は問い合わせにすぐ返事したいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular) agreeing with a feminine singular noun; nominative, part of the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP in nominative.
Finite modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses volition and selects the bare infinitive 'beantworten'.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; introduces the direct object 'Anfrage'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'beantworten' in the accusative.
Temporal adverb meaning immediacy; modifies the time of the action.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; non-separable prefix verb; complement of the modal 'will', taking 'die Anfrage' as accusative object.

sentences.target: Wir müssen die Nachrichten heute beantworten.

translations.de: Wir müssen die Nachrichten heute beantworten.
translations.en: We have to answer the messages today.
translations.es: Tenemos que contestar los mensajes hoy.
translations.fr: On doit répondre aux messages aujourd'hui.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天得回复这些消息。
translations.ru: Нам нужно ответить на сообщения сегодня.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng ta phải trả lời các tin nhắn.
translations.nl: We moeten de berichten vandaag beantwoorden.
translations.uk: Нам потрібно відповісти на повідомлення сьогодні.
translations.hi: हमें आज संदेशों का जवाब देना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να απαντήσουμε στα μηνύματα σήμερα.
translations.nb: Vi må svare på meldingene i dag.
translations.id: Kita harus menjawab pesan hari ini.
translations.sv: Vi måste svara på meddelandena i dag.
translations.ro: Trebuie să răspundem la mesaje astăzi.
translations.da: Vi skal svare på beskederne i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はメッセージに返信しないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person plural; expresses necessity and selects the bare infinitive 'beantworten'.
Definite article, plural accusative; introduces the direct object 'Nachrichten'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'beantworten' in the accusative.
Temporal adverb; specifies the time of the action.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; non-separable prefix verb; complement of the modal 'müssen', taking 'die Nachrichten' as accusative object.

sentences.target: Er wird die Frage sofort beantworten.

translations.de: Er wird die Frage sofort beantworten.
translations.en: He will answer the question immediately.
translations.es: Él contestará la pregunta de inmediato.
translations.fr: Il répondra à la question tout de suite.
translations.zh-Hans: 他会立刻回答这个问题。
translations.pt: Ele vai responder à pergunta imediatamente.
translations.vi: Anh ấy sẽ trả lời câu hỏi ngay.
translations.nl: Hij zal de vraag meteen beantwoorden.
translations.hi: वह सवाल का तुरंत जवाब देगा.
translations.nb: Han vil svare på spørsmålet med én gang.
translations.id: Dia akan menjawab pertanyaan itu segera.
translations.sv: Han kommer att svara på frågan direkt.
translations.ro: El va răspunde la întrebare imediat.
translations.da: Han vil svare på spørgsmålet med det samme.
translations.ja: 彼はその質問にすぐ答えます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (future construction), present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms future with the bare infinitive 'beantworten'.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; introduces the direct object 'Frage'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'beantworten' in the accusative.
Temporal adverb indicating immediacy; modifies the time of the action.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; non-separable prefix verb; complement of the auxiliary 'wird', taking 'die Frage' as accusative object.
